title: CENTCOM strikes Qeshm Island drone ground control station — response to IRGC shootdown of US MQ-1 drone
snippet: CENTCOM confirms strike on Iranian military ground control station for drones located on Qeshm Island. Strike is response to IRGC shootdown of US MQ-1 Predator drone operating over international waters. Continues pattern of precision tit-for-tat strikes between US and Iranian forces in the Gulf.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — CENTCOM이 케심 섬 이란 드론 지상관제소 타격. IRGC의 미국 MQ-1 드론 격추에 대한 보복. 걸프 지역 군사 교전 계속

entities.name: CENTCOM Qeshm Island Drone Station Strike (Jun 2)
